title: Portugal Solo
content: First solo trip? Portugal. Terrifying. Also the best decision I ever made. You learn things about yourself when you're the only one responsible for the itinerary. Like what you actually want. Not what you think you should want.
extended_content: I almost cancelled three times. What if I got lonely? What if something went wrong? What if I hated it? None of those things happened. What DID happen: I ate when I was hungry, not when someone else was. I spent three hours in one museum because I could. I changed my plans midday because why not? I met people I never would have met if I was in a group. Solo travel isn't about being alone. It's about meeting yourself.
when_to_tell: when someone is scared of solo travel
lesson: Sometimes you need to be alone to find yourself
